bead.title: Validate and publish the heimq Helm chart
bead.description: Make charts/heimq release-grade per docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: charts/heimq exists with Chart.yaml, values, templates, and README, but no CI workflow lints/templates/packages/publishes it. Chart version/appVersion currently 0.1.0 and image tag defaults to appVersion. In-scope files: charts/heimq/**, .github/workflows/* for Helm lint/package/publish, docs/release/* if needed. Out of scope: changing broker runtime behavior, Docker image workflow except consuming its tag contract, microsite.
bead.acceptance:
1. A CI workflow validates `helm lint charts/heimq` and `helm template heimq charts/heimq`.
2. A release flow packages the chart and documents or publishes a GHCR OCI chart path.
3. `grep -q "appVersion" charts/heimq/Chart.yaml` passes and chart image tag defaults resolve to a Docker tag published by release workflows.
4. `helm lint charts/heimq` passes.
5. `helm template heimq charts/heimq` passes.
6. `helm package charts/heimq` passes.
